---
name: Specification Proposal
about: Propose a new specification, enhancement, clarification, or architectural improvement.
title: "[Specification Proposal] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Summary

Provide a concise summary of the proposal.

---

# Motivation

Why is this proposal needed?

What problem does it solve?

---

# Proposed Change

Describe the proposed behavior or specification.

---

# Compatibility

Would this proposal affect existing specifications or implementations?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (please explain below)

If yes, describe the compatibility impact.

---

# Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives that were considered.

---

# References

Include references to existing specifications, discussions, or related standards if applicable.

---

# Additional Context

Provide diagrams, examples, or supporting information if needed.
